title: acaena integerrima
intro: Acaena integerrima, also known as the New Zealand thistle or silver spear, is a small, flowering perennial plant native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The plant has been found to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever and pain, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
